member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Extensions.ApiApplicationBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for adding API specific functionality to the application pipeline.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Extensions.ApiApplicationBuilderExtensions.UseJellyfinApiSwagger(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder,MediaBrowser.Controller.Configuration.IServerConfigurationManager)
member.summary: Adds swagger and swagger UI to the application pipeline.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Extensions.ApiApplicationBuilderExtensions.UseIPBasedAccessValidation(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds IP based access validation to the application pipeline.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Extensions.ApiApplicationBuilderExtensions.UseQueryStringDecoding(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Enables url decoding before binding to the application pipeline.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Extensions.ApiApplicationBuilderExtensions.UseBaseUrlRedirection(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds base url redirection to the application pipeline.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Extensions.ApiApplicationBuilderExtensions.UseServerStartupMessage(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds a custom message during server startup to the application pipeline.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Extensions.ApiApplicationBuilderExtensions.UseWebSocketHandler(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds a WebSocket request handler to the application pipeline.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Extensions.ApiApplicationBuilderExtensions.UseRobotsRedirection(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds robots.txt redirection to the application pipeline.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Extensions.ApiServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: API specific extensions for the service collection.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Extensions.ApiServiceCollectionExtensions.AddJellyfinApiAuthorization(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds jellyfin API authorization policies to the DI container.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Extensions.ApiServiceCollectionExtensions.AddCustomAuthentication(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds custom legacy authentication to the service collection.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Extensions.ApiServiceCollectionExtensions.AddJellyfinApi(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Reflection.Assembly},MediaBrowser.Common.Net.NetworkConfiguration)
member.summary: Extension method for adding the Jellyfin API to the service collection.
member.param: An IEnumerable containing all plugin assemblies with API controllers.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Extensions.ApiServiceCollectionExtensions.AddJellyfinApiSwagger(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds Swagger to the service collection.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Extensions.ApiServiceCollectionExtensions.AddProxyAddresses(MediaBrowser.Common.Net.NetworkConfiguration,System.String[],Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.ForwardedHeadersOptions)
member.summary: Sets up the proxy configuration based on the addresses/subnets in .

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Extensions.WebHostBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for configuring the web host builder.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Extensions.WebHostBuilderExtensions.ConfigureWebHostBuilder(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Hosting.IWebHostBuilder,Jellyfin.Server.CoreAppHost,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Configure the web host builder.
Configures a Kestrel type webServer to bind to the specific arguments.
member.param: The IP addresses that should be listend to.
If set the https port. If set you must also set the certificate.
The certificate used for https port.
member.exception: Will be thrown when a https port is set but no or an invalid certificate is provided.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Filters.AdditionalModelFilter
member.summary: Add models not directly used by the API, but used for discovery and websockets.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Filters.AdditionalModelFilter.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Controller.Configuration.IServerConfigurationManager)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Filters.CachingOpenApiProvider
member.summary: OpenApi provider with caching.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Filters.FlagsEnumSchemaFilter
member.summary: Schema filter to ensure flags enums are represented correctly in OpenAPI.
member.remarks: For flags enums: - The enum schema definition is set to type "string" (not integer). - Properties using flags enums are transformed to arrays referencing the enum schema.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Filters.IgnoreEnumSchemaFilter
member.summary: Filter to remove ignored enum values.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Filters.ParameterObsoleteFilter
member.summary: Mark parameter as deprecated if it has the .

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Filters.SecurityRequirementsOperationFilter
member.summary: Security requirement operation filter.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Filters.SecurityRequirementsOperationFilter.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization.IAuthorizationPolicyProvider)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Filters.SecuritySchemeReferenceFixupFilter
member.summary: Document filter that fixes security scheme references after document generation.
member.remarks: In Microsoft.OpenApi v2, requires a resolved Target to serialize correctly. References created without a host document (as in operation filters) serialize as empty objects. This filter re-creates all security scheme references with the document context so they resolve properly during serialization.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.HealthChecks.DbContextFactoryHealthCheck`1
member.summary: Implementation of the for a .

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Helpers.StartupHelpers
member.summary: A class containing helper methods for server startup.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Helpers.StartupHelpers.LogEnvironmentInfo(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths)
member.summary: Logs relevant environment variables and information about the host.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Helpers.StartupHelpers.CreateApplicationPaths(Jellyfin.Server.StartupOptions)
member.summary: Create the data, config and log paths from the variety of inputs(command line args, environment variables) or decide on what default to use. For Windows it's %AppPath% for everything else the XDG approach is followed.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Helpers.StartupHelpers.GetUnixSocketPath(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths)
member.summary: Gets the path for the unix socket Kestrel should bind to.
member.returns: The path for Kestrel to bind to.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Helpers.StartupHelpers.SetUnixSocketPermissions(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Sets the unix file permissions for Kestrel's socket file.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Helpers.StartupHelpers.InitLoggingConfigFile(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths)
member.summary: Initialize the logging configuration file using the bundled resource file as a default if it doesn't exist already.
member.returns: A task representing the creation of the configuration file, or a completed task if the file already exists.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Helpers.StartupHelpers.InitializeLoggingFramework(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths)
member.summary: Initialize Serilog using configuration and fall back to defaults on failure.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Helpers.StartupHelpers.PerformStaticInitialization
member.summary: Call static initialization methods for the application.

member.summary: Interface that describes a migration routine.

member.summary: Execute the migration routine.
member.param: A cancellation token triggered if the migration should be aborted.

member.summary: Interface that describes a migration routine.

member.summary: Execute the migration routine.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.IDatabaseMigrationRoutine
member.summary: Defines a migration that operates on the Database.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.JellyfinMigrationAttribute
member.summary: Declares an class as an migration with its set metadata.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.JellyfinMigrationAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The ordering this migration should be applied to. Must be a valid DateTime ISO8601 formatted string.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.JellyfinMigrationAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class for legacy migrations.
member.param: The ordering this migration should be applied to. Must be a valid DateTime ISO8601 formatted string.
[ONLY FOR LEGACY MIGRATIONS]The unique key of this migration. Must be a valid Guid formatted string.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.JellyfinMigrationAttribute.RunMigrationOnSetup
member.summary: Gets or Sets a value indicating whether the annoated migration should be executed on a fresh install.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.JellyfinMigrationAttribute.Stage
member.summary: Gets or Sets the stage the annoated migration should be executed at. Defaults to .

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.JellyfinMigrationAttribute.Order
member.summary: Gets the ordering of the migration.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.JellyfinMigrationAttribute.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the migration.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.JellyfinMigrationAttribute.Key
member.summary: Gets the Legacy Key of the migration. Not required for new Migrations.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.JellyfinMigrationBackupAttribute
member.summary: Marks an migration and instructs the to perform a backup.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.JellyfinMigrationBackupAttribute.LegacyLibraryDb
member.summary: Gets or Sets a value indicating whether a backup of the old library.db should be performed.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.JellyfinMigrationBackupAttribute.JellyfinDb
member.summary: Gets or Sets a value indicating whether a backup of the Database should be performed.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.JellyfinMigrationBackupAttribute.Metadata
member.summary: Gets or Sets a value indicating whether a backup of the metadata folder should be performed.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.JellyfinMigrationBackupAttribute.Trickplay
member.summary: Gets or Sets a value indicating whether a backup of the Trickplay folder should be performed.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.JellyfinMigrationBackupAttribute.Subtitles
member.summary: Gets or Sets a value indicating whether a backup of the Subtitles folder should be performed.

member.summary: Handles Migration of the Jellyfin data structure.

member.param: Provides access to the jellyfin database.
The startup logger for Startup UI intigration.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.Routines.CleanMusicArtist
member.summary: Cleans up all Music artists that have been migrated in the 10.11 RC migrations.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.Routines.CleanMusicArtist.#ctor(Jellyfin.Server.ServerSetupApp.IStartupLogger{Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.Routines.CleanMusicArtist},Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.IDbContextFactory{Jellyfin.Database.Implementations.JellyfinDbContext})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.Routines.CleanupOrphanedExtras
member.summary: Removes orphaned extras (items with OwnerId pointing to non-existent items). Must run before EF migrations that add FK constraints on OwnerId.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.Routines.CreateUserLoggingConfigFile
member.summary: Migration to initialize the user logging configuration file "logging.user.json". If the deprecated logging.json file exists and has a custom config, it will be used as logging.user.json, otherwise a blank file will be created.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.Routines.CreateUserLoggingConfigFile._defaultConfigHistory
member.summary: File history for logging.json as existed during this migration creation. The contents for each has been minified.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.Routines.CreateUserLoggingConfigFile.ExistingConfigUnmodified(System.String)
member.summary: Check if the existing logging.json file has not been modified by the user by comparing it to all the versions in our git history. Until now, the file has never been migrated after first creation so users could have any version from the git history.
member.exception: does not exist or could not be read.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.Routines.DisableTranscodingThrottling
member.summary: Disable transcode throttling for all installations since it is currently broken for certain video formats.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.Routines.FixAudioData
member.summary: Fixes the data column of audio types to be deserializable.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.Routines.FixDates
member.summary: Migration to fix dates saved in the database to always be UTC.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The startup logger for Startup UI integration.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.Routines.FixIncorrectOwnerIdRelationships
member.summary: Fixes incorrect OwnerId relationships where video/movie items are children of other video/movie items. These are alternate versions (4K vs 1080p) that were incorrectly linked as parent-child relationships by the auto-merge logic. Only legitimate extras (trailers, behind-the-scenes) should have OwnerId set. Also removes duplicate database entries for the same file path.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.Routines.FixLibrarySubtitleDownloadLanguages
member.summary: Migration to fix broken library subtitle download languages.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The startup logger for Startup UI integration.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.Routines.FixPlaylistOwner
member.summary: Properly set playlist owner.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.Routines.MigrateActivityLogDb
member.summary: The migration routine for migrating the activity log database to EF Core.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.Routines.MigrateAuthenticationDb
member.summary: A migration that moves data from the authentication database into the new schema.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.Routines.MigrateDisplayPreferencesDb
member.summary: The migration routine for migrating the display preferences database to EF Core.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Migration to move extracted files to the new directories.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The startup logger for Startup UI intigration.

member.summary: The migration routine for migrating the userdata database to EF Core.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The startup logger for Startup UI intigration.
The database provider for special access.

member.summary: Remove duplicate entries which were caused by a bug where a file was considered to be an "Extra" to itself.

member.summary: Remove duplicate playlist entries.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.Stages.JellyfinMigrationStageTypes
member.summary: Defines the stages the supports.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.Stages.JellyfinMigrationStageTypes.PreInitialisation
member.summary: Runs before services are initialised. Reserved for migrations that are modifying the application server itself. Should be avoided if possible.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.Stages.JellyfinMigrationStageTypes.CoreInitialisation
member.summary: Runs after the host has been configured and includes the database migrations. Allows the mix order of migrations that contain application code and database changes.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.Stages.JellyfinMigrationStageTypes.AppInitialisation
member.summary: Runs after services has been registered and initialised. Last step before running the server.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.Stages.MigrationStage
member.summary: Defines a Stage that can be Invoked and Handled at different times from the code.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Program
member.summary: Class containing the entry point of the application.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Server.Program.LoggingConfigFileDefault
member.summary: The name of logging configuration file containing application defaults.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Server.Program.LoggingConfigFileSystem
member.summary: The name of the logging configuration file containing the system-specific override settings.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Program.Main(System.String[])
member.summary: The entry point of the application.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Program.ApplyStartupMigrationAsync(Emby.Server.Implementations.ServerApplicationPaths,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: [Internal]Runs the startup Migrations.
member.remarks: Not intended to be used other then by jellyfin and its tests.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Program.ApplyCoreMigrationsAsync(System.IServiceProvider,Jellyfin.Server.Migrations.Stages.JellyfinMigrationStageTypes)
member.summary: [Internal]Runs the Jellyfin migrator service with the Core stage.
member.remarks: Not intended to be used other then by jellyfin and its tests.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Program.CreateAppConfiguration(Jellyfin.Server.StartupOptions,MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths)
member.summary: Create the application configuration.
member.param: The command line options passed to the program.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.ServerSetupApp.IStartupLogger
member.summary: Defines the Startup Logger. This logger acts an an aggregate logger that will push though all log messages to both the attached logger as well as the startup UI.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Server.ServerSetupApp.IStartupLogger.Topic
member.summary: Gets the topic this logger is assigned to.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.ServerSetupApp.IStartupLogger.With(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Adds another logger instance to this logger for combined logging.
member.param: Other logger to rely messages to.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.ServerSetupApp.IStartupLogger.BeginGroup(System.FormattableString)
member.summary: Opens a new Group logger within the parent logger.
member.param: Defines the log message that introduces the new group.
member.returns: A new logger that can write to the group.

member.summary: Adds another logger instance to this logger for combined logging.

member.summary: Opens a new Group logger within the parent logger.

member.returns: A new logger that can write to the group.

member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether Startup server is currently running.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Gets or Sets the underlying base logger.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.ServerSetupApp.StartupLogger`1
member.summary: Startup logger for usage with DI that utilises an underlying logger from the DI.
member.typeparam: The category of the underlying logger.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Defines a topic for the Startup UI.

member.summary: Gets or Sets the LogLevel.

member.summary: Gets or Sets the descriptor for the topic.

member.summary: Gets or sets the time the topic was created.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Server.ServerSetupApp.StartupLogTopic.Children
member.summary: Gets the child items of this topic.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.Startup
member.summary: Startup configuration for the Kestrel webhost.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Startup.#ctor(Jellyfin.Server.CoreAppHost,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Startup.ConfigureServices(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Configures the service collection for the webhost.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.Startup.Configure(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Hosting.IWebHostEnvironment,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Configures the app builder for the webhost.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Server.StartupOptions
member.summary: Class used by CommandLine package when parsing the command line arguments.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Server.StartupOptions.DataDir
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to the data directory.
member.value: The path to the data directory.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Server.StartupOptions.NoWebClient
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the server should not host the web client.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Server.StartupOptions.WebDir
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to the web directory.
member.value: The path to the web directory.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Server.StartupOptions.CacheDir
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to the cache directory.
member.value: The path to the cache directory.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Server.StartupOptions.ConfigDir
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to the config directory.
member.value: The path to the config directory.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Server.StartupOptions.LogDir
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to the log directory.
member.value: The path to the log directory.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Server.StartupOptions.NoDetectNetworkChange
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the server should not detect network status change.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Server.StartupOptions.RestoreArchive
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to an jellyfin backup archive to restore the application to.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Server.StartupOptions.ConvertToConfig
member.summary: Gets the command line options as a dictionary that can be used in the .NET configuration system.
